evals.name: architecture-decision
evals.prompt: We're choosing between microservices and monolith for our startup's backend. We have 5 engineers, expect 10K users initially, and need to launch in 3 months. Can you advise on this architecture decision?
evals.notes: Tests Lite mode consultation. Has some required variables but may need clarification. Should follow evidence hierarchy and provide structured output with roadmap.

evals.name: ux-redesign
evals.prompt: I'm a Senior Product Manager at a B2B SaaS company. Our onboarding flow has a 70% drop-off rate. I need an expert UX consultation on how to redesign it. This is for our engineering and design team leads.
evals.notes: Tests Full mode with complete variables (Domain: UX Design, Audience: Senior Eng/Design leads, Question: onboarding redesign). Should have all output sections including Practical Execution.

evals.name: incomplete-request
evals.prompt: I need advice on implementing a new system.
evals.notes: Tests clarification mode. Missing Domain, Audience, and specific question. Should ask up to 3 clarifying questions before proceeding.
